description_for_human: Check real-time surf conditions, scores, and forecasts for 1,000+ beaches worldwide.
description_for_model: Get real-time surf conditions for any of 1,000+ surf spots worldwide. Returns a score (0-100), a yes/no/maybe verdict, wave height, wave period, wind speed and direction, water temperature, trend forecast, and board recommendation. Use GET /api/agent/{spotId} for conditions, GET /api/spots for the list of spots, or GET /api/agent/nearest for location-based lookup.
